title: SilksongMC
description: A simple mod recreating features from Team Cherry's Hollow Knight: Silksong
body:
This mod aimed to recreate Team Cherry's new game Hollow Knight: Silksong! It includes custom combat and items inspired by Hornet's abilities.

I made a video about how I made this mod:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/McMztoScLWI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**Features:**

Hornet mask
- decreases air resistance
- removes fall damage
- allows dash (default key is C)

Added Hornet's Needle (right click to throw and grapple to a block or entity)

Added a pimpillo (kinda like a grenade)
